description: A physician wants a patient to have a follow-up lab test (e.g., A1c) done in three months. They need to place a future order.

nodes.task_description: Place an order for the A1c lab test.

expected_outcome.expected: Physician selects the correct lab test from the catalog.

nodes.task_description: Set the order to be 'Future' and specify the earliest date it can be drawn (e.g., three months from today).

expected_outcome.expected: Physician correctly designates the order as a future lab draw.

nodes.task_description: Sign the order. The order will remain pending and will automatically activate on the specified date.

expected_outcome.expected: The future order is successfully placed and will become active at the appropriate time.
